'''âs-f-k-ng''' ('''kasafkengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yellowline|yellowline]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yellowline|yellowline]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-f-k-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kasafkengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisafkengoko|thisafkengoko]] || [[word:jisafkengoko|jisafkengoko]] || [[word:shisafkengoko|shisafkengoko]] || [[word:kisafkengoko|kisafkengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusafkengoko|thuthusafkengoko]] || [[word:jujusafkengoko|jujusafkengoko]] || [[word:shushusafkengoko|shushusafkengoko]] || [[word:kukusafkengoko|kukusafkengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
